candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row clearly tied to COGS/cost of revenues. However, it appears to be a component of the selected parent bucket 'Cost of goods sold', supported by the nearby 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value' line, so adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row is 'Cost of goods sold'. 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' looks embedded within that bucket rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A tied to selling expenses, but the nearby 'Selling Expenses - Balancing value' indicates it is a component of the selected 'Selling Expenses' row, so it should not be added separately.

This is R&D-related amortization, but 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, adding this separately would risk distorting the intended XSGA minus XRD construction.
